prestazioni: M840T 4.0L twin-turbo V8 (765PS stock) upgraded with a bespoke McLaren Special Operations (MSO) Stage 2+ ECU calibration, optimizing ignition timing and fuel maps for E85 flex-fuel compatibility, paired with a Weistec Engineering titanium valve retainer kit to reduce valvetrain mass by 40% for 9,000 RPM stability

Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (84mm billet compressor wheels, 76mm turbine wheels) with custom Inconel 718 turbine housings and TiAL Sport MV-R 44mm wastegates, mated to a CSF Racing 4-core front-mount intercooler (50% larger than OEM) and a PWR radiator for sustained 1.5-bar boost in 40°C ambient temps

AP Racing CP9666-1000 6-piston monoblock calipers with 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors (upgraded from 390mm) and Ferodo DS3.12 racing pads, paired with a HEL Performance braided stainless steel brake line kit and Castrol SRF racing brake fluid (500°C boiling point) for 1,200kg stopping power from 200km/h in 4.2 seconds
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with custom 3D-printed ABS plastic canards and a Vorsteiner V-RT 1100 rear wing (adjustable carbon fiber, 15% more downforce than OEM at 250km/h)

MSO Bespoke 'Velocity Yellow' paint with a 3M Matte Black 2080 wrap overlay on the roof, mirrors, and front splitter, featuring a custom 'LT Spider' graphic in 3M Gloss Red 1080 on the hood and doors, with a bare carbon fiber weave finish on the rear bumper and side skirts

OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 20x10.5 ET45 (front) and 21x12.5 ET50 (rear) forged wheels in Gloss Black, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (275/30 R20 front, 325/30 R21 rear), with a custom TPMS system from Schrader Electronics for real-time tire pressure and temperature monitoring via a RaceLogic VBOX Sport display
